bracu_official.title: BRAC University IEEE society hosts seminar on careers in big tech and AI startups
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University IEEE society is hosting a seminar focused on career opportunities within big tech and AI startups.

bracu_official.summary: BRAC University, in collaboration with the Sporsho Braille Foundation, undertook a visit to the Baptist Mission Integrated School.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch World Cup match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador joined BRAC University students for a special viewing of his home team's World Cup quarter-final match.
